title: After Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-Enies Lobby storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #4, Franky, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #4, Franky, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Then you'd better have some good explanation,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Otherwise there's no way they'll back off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I... I'm really thankful to you guys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: More than I can ever imagine....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I want to go with you guys...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It'll sail off, cross many seas,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I wonder if it's the pirate blood.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You are still regretting and blaming yourself

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: and directed you to the new road....!!!

summary: This scene advances the Post-Enies Lobby conflict through Unknown person #4, Franky, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #1, focusing on the immediate stakes of after enies lobby: rising conflict.
